app.title: SocialBlast AI
inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Review, approve, and schedule posts. Nothing publishes without your say.
compose.placeholder: What's on your mind? Drafts go to the approval queue.
pending.title: Awaiting approval
published.title: Recently published
published.empty_body: Drafts you approve will appear here with a link to the live page.

first_run.title: Ready to publish
first_run.subtitle: Three steps to your first live post.
first_run.step1_body: Link Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, or any platform you use.
first_run.step2_body: Answer a few questions so AI drafts sound like you.
first_run.step3_body: Write it yourself or let AI generate a draft for you.
